command:
git commit -m t0027_literature_survey_morphology_ds_modeling [implementation]: add 5 priority-2 paper assets + 2 paywall interventions

Build paper assets for the next five candidates from research-internet:
- 10.1017_S0952523804214109 (Tukker 2004): SAC passive cable, peak DSI ~0.9 at distal tips
- 10.1371_journal.pbio.0050185 (Hausselt 2007): SAC dendrite-length sweep, DSI 0.35 -> 0.12
- 10.1016_j.neuron.2016.02.020 (Vlasits 2016): SAC input clustering on proximal dendrite
- 10.1038_nature13240 (Kim 2014): EM-derived SAC space-time wiring connectome
- 10.1038_nn.3565 (Sivyer 2013): DSGC distal Na/Ca dendritic-spike branch independence

Two PDFs were paywalled and could not be retrieved from open mirrors (Kim2014 Nature
+ PMC JS challenge; Sivyer2013 Nature confirmed closed by Unpaywall). Intervention
files filed in intervention/ describing what was tried and what is needed (Sheffield
SSO). Summaries were written from CrossRef abstract + PMC HTML full-text and meet the
spec >=500-word + 9-section quality bar regardless of PDF presence.

Vlasits2016 DOI was corrected during retrieval: task brief listed
10.1016/j.neuron.2016.02.017 which CrossRef resolves to an unrelated autism review.
The correct Vlasits paper DOI is 10.1016/j.neuron.2016.02.020 — folder name
matches the corrected DOI per spec rule PA-E004.
